To add horizontal lines along the side of your car with your key, first disassemble your key by breaking off the blade. Using the remaining key piece, measure and mark equal increments down each side of the car along the exterior, starting at the front. With a handheld powerdrill or awl, make small pilot holes at each of the marks, and use a nailset to drive in thin strips of metal along the marked lines. You may need to use masking tape to keep the pieces of metal from rusting or flaking off. Reassemble the key blade as necessary and voila, your car should now be standing out amongst the crowd!
